quality.rationale: 利用矢量密度协散度恒等式与电磁场张量反对称性推导守恒律，逻辑链条完整且可迁移至其他规范场。

origin.question: Problem 14.15. Show that Maxwell's equations $\mathbf{F}_{; \nu}^{\mu \nu} = 4\pi \mathbf{J}^{\mu}$ , imply $\mathbf{J}_{; \mu}^{\mu} = 0$ .
origin.solution: According to Problem 7.7 (i) and Maxwell's equations\\n$$\\n4 \\pi J^{\\mu} = F_{; \\nu}^{\\mu \\nu} = \\frac {1}{| g |^{\\frac {1}{2}}} (| g |^{\\frac {1}{2}} F^{\\mu \\nu})_{, \\nu}\\n$$\\n$$\\n4 \\pi \\mathrm {J}_{; \\mu}^{\\mu} = 4 \\pi \\frac {1}{| \\mathrm {g} |^{\\frac {1}{2}}} \\left(\\mathrm {J}^{\\mu} | \\mathrm {g} |^{\\frac {1}{2}}\\right)_{, \\mu} = \\frac {1}{| \\mathrm {g} |^{\\frac {1}{2}}} \\left(| \\mathrm {g} |^{\\frac {1}{2}} \\mathrm {F}^{\\mu \\nu}\\right)_{, \\nu \\mu}.\\n$$\\nSince $\\mathbf{F}$ is antisymmetric this must vanish.
